  • Uses of Tensor in org.jscience.core.mathematics.linearalgebra

    Methods in org.jscience.core.mathematics.linearalgebra that return Tensor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.add(Tensor<T> other)
    Element-wise addition.
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.broadcast(int... newShape)
    Broadcasts this tensor to a new shape.
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.copy()
    Returns a copy of this tensor.
    default Tensor<T>
    Tensor.einsum(String equation, Tensor<T>... operands)
    Performs Einstein summation.
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.map(Function<T,T> function)
    Applies a function to each element of the tensor.
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.multiply(Tensor<T> other)
    Element-wise multiplication (Hadamard product).
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.reshape(int... newShape)
    Reshapes this tensor to a new shape.
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.scale(T scalar)
    Scalar multiplication.
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.slice(int[] starts, int[] sizes)
    Returns a slice (sub-tensor) of this tensor.
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.subtract(Tensor<T> other)
    Element-wise subtraction.
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.sum(int axis)
    Sums along the specified axis.
    default Tensor<E>
    Matrix.toTensor()
    Converts this matrix to a rank-2 tensor.
    default Tensor<E>
    Vector.toTensor()
    Converts this vector to a rank-1 tensor.
    default Tensor<T>
    Tensor.transpose()
    Transposes a rank-2 tensor (matrix).
    Tensor<T>
    Tensor.transpose(int... permutation)
    Transposes dimensions according to the given permutation.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DenseTensor<T>
    Dense tensor implementation backed by a flat array.
    class 
    SparseTensor<T>
    Sparse tensor implementation using a map for non-zero elements.

    Creates a tensor from data with automatic storage selection.
    static <T> Tensor<T>
    TensorFactory.of(T[] data, TensorFactory.Storage storage, int... shape)
    Creates a tensor from data with explicit storage selection.
    <T> Tensor<T>
    TensorBackend.ones(Class<T> elementType, int... shape)
    Creates a tensor with the given shape, filled with ones.
    static <T> Tensor<T>
    TensorFactory.ones(Class<T> elementType, int... shape)
    Creates a one-filled tensor with automatic storage selection.
    static <T> Tensor<T>
    TensorFactory.ones(Class<T> elementType, TensorFactory.Storage storage, int... shape)
    Creates a one-filled tensor with explicit storage selection.
